/CAL:SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/SAWD/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALLTERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THATTIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE OF 06-13-22 IS CONFIRMED/DOPU:POSITIVE ACM REPORT/

/CAL:SHERIFF'S AFFIVADIT WARRANT/SAWD/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO FOLLOW ACTIVE CRIMINAL PROTECTIVE ORDER FILED 03-22-22/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALLTERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/VD:04-27-22/CONTD:PRETRIALCONFERENCE/DOPU:ACM/

/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE & SHERIFF AFFIDAVIT WARRANT OF 04-19-22/X:DEFENDANT PRESENT BY ZOOM/ /NEGRPT/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO CHECK IN WITH ACM FIVE TIMES A WEEK BY PHONE/ /CTORD:SHERIFF AFFIDAVIT WARRANT OF 04-19-22, TO REMAINOUTSTANDING/CONT/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURR,/GTWM/ACM/CTORD:ACM TO DETERMINE IF DEFENDANT NEEDS OUTPATIENT OR INPATIENT TREATMENT AND DEFENDANT ISORDERED TO CALL ACM 5 TIMES A WEEK/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OFRELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITYPROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIORTO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SAORD/SA1:JANET NORTON/SA2:990 PACIFIC AVE,,SF/SAORD3/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DOPU:ACM/
